name: hormozi-leads
description: Operationalize Alex Hormozi's $100M Leads framework. Get strangers to want to buy. Design lead magnets using the 7-step framework, activate Core Four acquisition channels (Warm→Content→Cold→Paid), break down markets using the Starving Crowd framework, and write high-converting hooks and headlines. Commands: /hormozi-leads:gen-leads, /hormozi-leads:build-magnet, /hormozi-leads:break-market, /hormozi-leads:write-hooks.

changelog.1.0.0: Initial release — Lead Magnet Generator, Core Four Activation, Market Breakdown (Starving Crowd), Hooks & Headline Engine. Source: $100M Leads + ACQ Closer Handbook.
